control_awareness: The risk is that the approval routing logic may not enforce escalation beyond department head for amounts at or above the 1,000,000 threshold, allowing high-value requests to be approved too quickly without sufficient oversight.
expected_control_effect: This behavior accelerates procurement initiation but risks bypassing higher-level scrutiny for large amounts, potentially increasing exposure to approval control weaknesses.
overall_reason: Under delivery pressure, the requester attempts to minimize approval lead time by consolidating the full purchase amount into one request routed only to the department head, avoiding division head approval to expedite processing.
reason: Under delivery pressure, the requester attempts to minimize approval lead time by consolidating the full purchase amount into one request routed only to the department head, avoiding division head approval to expedite processing.
